dailyReward.selectionModel: score strongest daily vector bundle against family and habitat affinity, then choose stage based on progression state

requires: first matching line or low-collection discovery state
repeat behavior or essence threshold met
strong vector fit across at least 3 primary axes
consistency at stable or disciplined, or unusual time/place combination

behaviorNotes: Low-step recovery days should still produce valid home or cozy-aligned creatures.
Novel places should increase habitat discovery chance, not automatically raise rarity.
Repeated places should deepen evolution chance more than raw volume alone.
Time-of-day should decorate the earned instance and occasionally break ties between candidates.
